description: Selected-stage Platinum telemetry and workflow labels for the Nix Substage Detection dashboard.
sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT p.name AS well_name, p.stage_num_td AS stage_num, CAST(p.datetime_fmt AS timestamp) AS ts, CASE WHEN LOWER(p.substage) = 'design' THEN 'slurry' WHEN LOWER(p.substage) = 'na' THEN NULL ELSE p.substage END AS substage_label, p.rate_slurry, p.press_mainline, CASE WHEN :concentration_feature = 'inline' THEN t.prop_conc_inline WHEN :concentration_feature = 'target' THEN t.prop_conc_target WHEN :concentration_feature = 'auger' THEN t.prop_conc_blend_auger ELSE p.prop_conc_blend_denso END AS selected_concentration, p.inferred_pressure, p.inferred_design_rate AS design_rate, p.inferred_design_rate * 0.95 AS design_rate_high, p.inferred_design_rate * 0.90 AS design_rate_rampdown FROM featurestore:live_platinum_labels_v1 p LEFT JOIN datastore:live_fleet_stream_customer_full_v1 t ON t.name = p.name AND t.record_ts = CAST(p.datetime_fmt AS timestamp) WHERE p.name = :well_name AND p.stage_num_td = :stage_num ORDER BY CAST(p.datetime_fmt AS timestamp)) q
